title: Bully Ray Criticizes Seth Rollins' WWE Raw Promo: 'Nobody Wants To Hear Him Complain'
summary: Bully Ray criticizes several aspects of Seth Rollins' WWE Raw promo, particularly Rollins remarks about Roman Reigns, saying "nobody wants to hear him complain"
imageAlt: Bully Ray Criticizes Seth Rollins' WWE Raw Promo: 'Nobody Wants To Hear Him Complain'
aiSummary: Bully Ray criticizes several aspects of Seth Rollins' WWE Raw promo, particularly Rollins remarks about Roman Reigns, saying "nobody wants to hear him complain"

whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.

multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullArticle:
After challenging Roman Reigns for the WWE World Heavyweight Championship last week on "WWE Raw," Seth Rollins was back this week to discuss the reasons why he was going after Reigns. And unlike the initial encounter with Reigns, it largely left Bully Ray unimpressed. Reviewing the promo for "Busted Open Radio," Bully's problems began immediately, feeling Rollins allowed the fans too much time to start chanting for CM Punk instead of getting to the meat of his promo.

"Dude, if you're Seth Rollins and you're starting off 'Monday Night Raw,' and you're screaming 'Chicago man it's great to be back in this building,' and then you give them a long enough pause where they start to chant 'Punk,' why give them that long to start a chant?"
